rows.label: qev056001_MSG0001
rows.name:
To think the sacred Ovah
would cohabit with a primitive lifeform
like a Bio Nalki...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0002
rows.name: I knew that your people multiply by dividing yourselves, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_JNK0010
rows.name: Interest[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask for details about the Orphean division process.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_JNK0020
rows.name: Question[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask what the Ovah actually is in the first place.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0003
rows.name: We are protected by the power of the Ovah.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0004
rows.name:
Even if we sustain wounds, contract illnesses, and eventually face death,
as long as the Ovah exists within our bodies,
we divide and continue our existence.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0005
rows.name: To us, the Ovah is an existence equal to a god.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0006
rows.name:
To us, the Ovah is an existence equal to a god.
We are protected by the power of the Ovah.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0007
rows.name:
Even if we sustain wounds, contract illnesses, and eventually face death,
as long as the Ovah exists within our bodies,
we divide and continue our existence.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0008
rows.name: So the ability to divide and multiply wasn't an inherent trait of your people?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0009
rows.name:
We are who we are because of the Ovah.
Without the Ovah, our species cannot survive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0010
rows.name:
The Ovah and us are one in body and soul.
But to think that the Ovah would extend its influence to a lower lifeform like the Bio Nalki...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0011
rows.name: So... the Ovah is a virus that heals or multiplies lifeforms... is that it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0012
rows.name:
But the Ovah is supposed to be an existence that can only survive within our bodies.
Why would it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0013
rows.name: Han'boiton, do you have any idea why the Ovah was absorbed by the Bio Nalki?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0014
rows.name:
...A reason... Don't tell me... Could it be...?
...No... I don't want to think about it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_JNK0030
rows.name: Interest[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_SEL0031
rows.name: Press him for details on why the Ovah exists within a native creature.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_JNK0040
rows.name: Question[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask if something terrible happened.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0015
rows.name:
I have a guess...
But it is strictly a deduction.
I do not wish to voice it right now...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0016
rows.name:
It's rare to see a rational Orphean hesitate like that.
I guess you guys possess emotions no different from us Earthlings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0017
rows.name:
However, the difference between your people and us is that
we calmly consider the situation at all times
and act to resolve it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0018
rows.name:
Yes... this must be the emotion called fear...
That is how your people would express it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0019
rows.name:
But we Orpheans are lifeforms that suppress emotion
and take rational action.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0020
rows.name: Do you have any idea why the Ovah is inside the Bio Nalki?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0021
rows.name:
I do.
But it is still merely a deduction...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0022
rows.name:
This is a weapon equipped with a function to halt the Ovah's activity.
I want you to use this to defeat the Bio Nalki.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0023
rows.name:
I hear there are about ten of them in the Black Steel Continent.
It seems the other Bio Nalki have not been affected by the Ovah.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0024
rows.name:
If you defeat those ten Bio Nalki in the Black Steel Continent with this weapon,
they should no longer divide and multiply.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0025
rows.name:
...And there is something I wish to confirm.
After defeating them, please bring me biological samples once more.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0026
rows.name: I still lack sufficient samples to reach a conclusion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0027
rows.name:
We need to prevent a massive proliferation of Bio Nalki
before they become a threat to us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0028
rows.name:
I'm asking this for the safety of the people in NLA too.
I'm counting on you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0029
rows.name:
If you defeat those ten Bio Nalki in the Black Steel Continent with this weapon,
they should no longer divide and multiply.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0077
rows.name:
Have you completed the mission?
If so, I would like you to return the anti-Ovah weapon I gave you—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0078
rows.name:
Hmm—To facilitate a smooth handover,
it would be helpful if you could unequip it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0030
rows.name:
...You've returned safely.
Now, let us analyze the samples.
The samples and—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0031
rows.name:
Ah yes, please return the anti-Ovah weapon as well.
Now that the Bio Nalki have been eradicated,
that should be of no use to you anymore.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0032
rows.name:
...The reason why the Bio Nalki absorbed the Ovah...
has become clear.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_JNK0050
rows.name: Interest[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask for details on why the Ovah was absorbed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_JNK0060
rows.name: Question[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask why his tone is so heavy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0033
rows.name:
We were forcibly brought to Mira by Growth.
Including myself, there were seven of our comrades at the time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0034
rows.name: But the number of Orpheans we rescued was supposed to be five...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0035
rows.name:
Before the Earthlings came to rescue us,
one Orphean escaped...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0036
rows.name:
And another Orphean chose to remain subordinate to Growth.
Even among the Orphe, there are abnormal individuals.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0037
rows.name:
In the end, the five of us sided with the Earthlings.
Believing in the Earthlings' victory...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0038
rows.name: The one who escaped kept running... and disappeared without a trace.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0039
rows.name: We thought he had successfully evaded Growth's pursuers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0040
rows.name:
However, he was preyed upon by a Bio Nalki...
That is what I understood from the analysis results.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0041
rows.name:
Because the death of a comrade has been confirmed.
We were forcibly brought to Mira by Growth.
Including myself, there were seven of our comrades at the time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0042
rows.name: But the number of Orpheans we rescued was supposed to be five...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0043
rows.name:
Before the Earthlings came to rescue us,
one Orphean escaped...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0044
rows.name:
And another Orphean chose to remain subordinate to Growth.
Even among the Orphe, there are abnormal individuals.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0045
rows.name:
In the end, the five of us sided with the Earthlings.
Believing in the Earthlings' victory...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0046
rows.name: The one who escaped kept running... and disappeared without a trace.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0047
rows.name: We thought he had successfully evaded Growth's pursuers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0048
rows.name:
However, he was preyed upon by a Bio Nalki...
That is what I understood from the analysis results.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0049
rows.name:
The Bio Nalki that ate our fellow Orphean
absorbed the power of the Ovah that resided within him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0050
rows.name:
It is unbelievable.
For a Bio Nalki and the Ovah to coexist...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0051
rows.name: Are you saying the Ovah was inside the Bio Nalki?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0052
rows.name:
To think that the noble Ovah, which governs the prosperity of the Orphe,
would reside within such a primitive creature.
It is extremely shocking...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0053
rows.name:
Shocking... To think that I, an Orphean,
would experience such an emotion...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_JNK0070
rows.name: Comfort[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_SEL0071
rows.name: Comfort him, saying it is only natural to feel that way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_JNK0080
rows.name: Speculate[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_SEL0081
rows.name:
Suggest there must be a reason why the Ovah
was compatible with a native creature.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0054
rows.name: The Ovah can only cohabit with us Orpheans.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0055
rows.name:
The Ovah, being a special virus body,
can only survive within an Orphean.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0056
rows.name:
Even if lifeforms other than higher beings like us Orpheans
attempted to absorb the Ovah, it would be impossible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0057
rows.name:
Let alone dividing and multiplying.
There is no way anyone other than an Orphean could do that...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0058
rows.name:
It's a creature with a rather primitive structure.
Perhaps its simplicity is exactly what made compatibility with the Ovah so easy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0059
rows.name:
Simple structures are generally easier to combine with things
than complex structures, after all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0060
rows.name: That's right. Bio Nalki are creatures with a rather primitive structure.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0061
rows.name: Perhaps their simplicity is exactly what made compatibility with the Ovah so easy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0062
rows.name:
Simple structures are generally easier to combine with things
than complex structures, after all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0063
rows.name:
However, this calls into question the very significance
of existence for us Orpheans.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0064
rows.name: The Ovah can only cohabit with us Orpheans.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0065
rows.name:
The Ovah, being a special virus body,
can only survive within an Orphean.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0066
rows.name:
Even if lifeforms other than higher beings like us Orpheans
attempted to absorb the Ovah, it would be impossible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0067
rows.name:
Let alone dividing and multiplying.
There is no way anyone other than an Orphean could do that...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0068
rows.name:
Don't worry too much about it.
It's not like the rational Orpheans to fret over this.
It's just a virus, isn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0069
rows.name: I cannot forgive that phrasing![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0070
rows.name: You're angry!? That's rare...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0071
rows.name:
Even if it is just a virus in the eyes of aliens,
the Ovah is like a guardian deity to us.
I ask that you refrain from speaking of it so lightly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0072
rows.name:
I see... I apologize if I offended you.
I'm sorry.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0073
rows.name:
As long as you understand...
In any case, we were able to eradicate the Ovah from the native creatures.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0074
rows.name:
This was also thanks to the cooperation of Earthlings.
Earthlings truly are useful to us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0075
rows.name:
It means our interests align.
Well then, I'll be counting on you from here on out.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056001_MSG0076
rows.name: Yes, likewise.[ST:wait ]
